title: deserialize_optional_nullable_string has no test for invalid-value error path
description: Scenario: server sends statusText: 42 (number) or statusText: [] (array) in a ChatPresenceEvent. The deserializer returns Err, which propagates as a serde deserialization failure — the event is silently dropped or errors. This is probably correct behavior but it is untested. Maintainer consequence: a contributor modifying the deserializer has no test to catch regressions in the error path. Fix: add a test asserting that a non-null, non-string value returns an error.
close_reason: test_deserialize_optional_nullable_string_rejects_non_string added and passing — number value returns Err.
